plainExpression: before a countable noun A large indefinite number

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘before a countable noun A large indefinite number’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在可數名詞之前：大量、不確定的數量」？

example.text: There are many students in the class.

translation.zh-Hant: 班上有很多學生。

meaning.en: Before a countable noun: A large, indefinite number of.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在可數名詞之前：大量、不確定的數量。

example.text: The phrase “Many temptations” shows how many is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「許多誘惑」一詞表明了它在上下文中使用了多少次。

meaning.en: A quantifier that can be used with count nouns and is often preceded by ‘as’ or ‘too’ or ‘so’ or ‘that’; amounting to a large but indefinite number; quantifier, plural pronoun; quantifier, plural.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種可以用於計數名詞的量詞，通常前面有「as」、「too」、「so」或「that」；相當於一個大但不確定的數量；量詞，複數代詞；量詞，複數。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Give me your help.’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「幫我一把」？

example.text: The lesson uses “lend me a hand” as a phrase in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 本課程將「幫我一把」作為上下文中的短語。

meaning.en: Lend me a hand.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幫我一把。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a little while’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「等一下」？

translation.zh-Hant: 本課程將「等一下」作為上下文中的短語。

meaning.en: Just a moment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 等一下。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「告訴我」？

example.text: The lesson uses “let me know” as a phrase in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 本課程將「告訴我」作為上下文中的短語。

meaning.en: Let me know.
meaning.zh-Hant: 告訴我。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「節肢動物（屬於昆蟲類）的特點是六條腿，最多四對翅膀，以及由角質構成的外殼」？

example.text: Butterflies are insects that flutter around in the garden.

translation.zh-Hant: 蝴蝶是在花園裡翩翩起舞的昆蟲。

meaning.en: An arthropod (in the Insecta class) characterized by six legs, up to four wings, and a chitinous exoskeleton.
meaning.zh-Hant: 節肢動物（屬於昆蟲類）的特點是六條腿，最多四對翅膀，以及由角質構成的外殼。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將空氣吸入肺部，哺乳動物透過抬高胸壁和使隔膜扁平來完成，這是呼吸行為的一部分」？

translation.zh-Hant: 你最大的靈感來源是什麼？

meaning.en: The drawing of air into the lungs, accomplished in mammals by elevation of the chest walls and flattening of the diaphragm, as part of the act of breathing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將空氣吸入肺部，哺乳動物透過抬高胸壁和使隔膜扁平來完成，這是呼吸行為的一部分。

plainExpression: A very short period of time; a moment

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「非常短的時間；一瞬間」？

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種用於製作音樂的裝置」？

example.text: Go and ask him how much the instrument is."

translation.zh-Hant: 去問他這件樂器多少錢。」。

meaning.en: Address a legal document to.

meaning.en: Secret information about an enemy (or potential enemy).
meaning.zh-Hant: 關於敵人（或潛在敵人的）秘密資訊。

plainExpression: Of high or especially quick cognitive capacity, bright

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「具有高或特別快速的認知能力，聰明」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她是一位聰明的學生，學習成績優異。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「借錢的固定費用；通常是借款金額的百分比」？

example.text: He has a keen interest in technology and often spends his free time learning new things.

translation.zh-Hant: 他對技術充滿熱情，經常在空閒時間學習新事物。

meaning.zh-Hant: 借錢的固定費用；通常是借款金額的百分比。

translation.zh-Hant: 我在銀行裡的錢利息很低。

meaning.en: Be on the mind of.
meaning.zh-Hant: 放在心上。

senseRefs: en:any stake held by any type of stakeholder
en:something or someone as focus of attention
en:persons and companies interested in any particular business or measure

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「參與或受到影響，或有索賠或有份」？

example.text: The interested parties met to discuss the business.

translation.zh-Hant: 相關各方召開會議，討論這項業務。

meaning.en: Involved in or affected by or having a claim to or share in.
meaning.zh-Hant: 參與或受到影響，或有索賠或有份。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與所有或至少兩個或多個國家有關或屬於」？

translation.zh-Hant: 國際代表參加了這次會議。

meaning.en: Concerning or belonging to all or at least two or more nations.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與所有或至少兩個或多個國家有關或屬於。

example.text: Many international organizations work together to promote peace and stability.

translation.zh-Hant: 許多國際組織共同努力促進和平與穩定。

meaning.en: Any of several international socialist organizations.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幾個國際社會主義組織中的任何一個。

meaning.zh-Hant: 君主或其他重要人物的正式面對面會議。

example.text: She had a job interview with the company.

translation.zh-Hant: 她和公司進行了工作面試。

meaning.en: Discuss formally with (somebody) for the purpose of an evaluation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與（某人）正式討論，目的是進行評估。

meaning.en: Cause to come to know personally.

meaning.en: To design a new process or mechanism.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計一個新的過程或機制。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「邀請某人到某人的家」？

meaning.en: A colloquial expression for invitation.

plainExpression: A contiguous area of land smaller than a

senseRefs: en:psychological or emotional difficulty, or any intractable problem

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個完整的單個單位；特別是在列表或集合中包含時」？

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種由煮熟明膠（或植物性替代品，如瓊脂或卡拉海因）、糖和一些調味品（通常來自水果）製成的甜點，然後使其凝固」？

meaning.zh-Hant: 一種由煮熟明膠（或植物性替代品，如瓊脂或卡拉海因）、糖和一些調味品（通常來自水果）製成的甜點，然後使其凝固。

meaning.en: Of the blackest black; similar to the color of jet or coal.

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「需要作為職責或以特定費用完成的一項特定工作」？

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供幸福源泉的東西或某人」？

translation.zh-Hant: 喝果汁給我帶來了大量的精力。

example.text: The phrase “To keep silence; to keep possession” shows how keep is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「保持沉默；保持佔有」這句話展示了保持在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: To continue in (a course or mode of action); to not intermit or fall from; to uphold or maintain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 繼續在（課程或行動方式）中；不要間斷或掉落；堅持或維持。

example.text: Each child was expected to pay for their keep.

translation.zh-Hant: 每個孩子都應該支付自己的住宿費用。

meaning.en: The financial means whereby one lives.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個人生活的經濟手段。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用鑰匙刮擦車身側面來破壞汽車」？

example.text: She scratched the car with her keys to vandalize it.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用鑰匙颳了刮車，破壞了它。

meaning.en: Vandalize a car by scratching the sides with a key.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用鑰匙刮擦車身側面來破壞汽車。

example.text: The key is an essential component of the car.

translation.zh-Hant: 鑰匙是汽車的重要組成部分。

meaning.en: Serving as an essential component.
meaning.zh-Hant: 作為一個基本組成部分。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用腳擊打」？

example.text: He kicked the ball towards the goal.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把球踢向了球門。

meaning.en: Strike with the foot.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用腳擊打。

example.text: He gave the ball a powerful kick.

translation.zh-Hant: 他用力踢了球。

meaning.en: The act of delivering a blow with the foot.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用腳打擊的行為。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任何年齡的人類後代（兒子或女兒）」？

example.text: They were able to send their kids to college.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們能夠送孩子上大學。

meaning.en: A human offspring (son or daughter) of any age.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何年齡的人類後代（兒子或女兒）。

example.text: That 'Ayumi' kid, only 13 but has performed in movies and theatres as a child actor since she was five.

translation.zh-Hant: 那個「Ayumi」的孩子，只有13歲，但從五歲起就作為兒童演員在電影和劇院裡表演。

meaning.en: Tell false information to for fun.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了好玩而說謊。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「致命」？

example.text: The phrase “Cigarettes kill” shows how kill is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「香菸會殺死人」這句話展示了殺死是如何在上下文中使用的。

meaning.en: Be fatal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 致命。

example.text: The pilot reported two kills during the mission.

translation.zh-Hant: 飛行員報告說，在任務期間擊落了兩架飛機。

meaning.en: The destruction of an enemy plane or ship or tank or missile.
meaning.zh-Hant: 摧毀敵方飛機、船隻、坦克或導彈。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「導致死亡的因果因素」？

example.text: The killer was caught on camera committing the crime.

translation.zh-Hant: 殺人犯在犯罪時被攝像頭拍到。

meaning.en: The causal agent resulting in death.
meaning.zh-Hant: 導致死亡的因果因素。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一千克；國際單位制下採用的基本品質單位」？

example.text: She weighed the apples in kilograms.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用千克來稱蘋果。

meaning.en: One thousand grams; the basic unit of mass adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一千克；國際單位制下採用的基本品質單位。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擁有或表現出溫柔、體貼和樂於助人的性格；特別用於人及其行為」？

example.text: He is a kind person who always helps others.

translation.zh-Hant: 他是一個善良的人，總是幫助別人。

meaning.en: Having or showing a tender and considerate and helpful nature; used especially of persons and their behavior.
meaning.zh-Hant: 擁有或表現出溫柔、體貼和樂於助人的性格；特別用於人及其行為。

example.text: There are many kinds of animals in the zoo.

translation.zh-Hant: 動物園裡有很多種類的動物。

meaning.en: A category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種以一些共同的特徵或品質為區別的類別。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在特定類別、群體或領域中的優勢」？

example.text: The king is the leader of the kingdom.

translation.zh-Hant: 國王是王國的領袖。

meaning.en: Preeminence in a particular category or group or field.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在特定類別、群體或領域中的優勢。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個擁有國王或女王作為實際或名義上的統治者的領域」？

example.text: During the 15th century, the Ryukyu Kingdom was a tributary state of Imperial China.

translation.zh-Hant: 在15世紀，琉球王國是中國帝國的附庸國。

meaning.en: A realm having a king or queen as its actual or nominal sovereign.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個擁有國王或女王作為實際或名義上的統治者的領域。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「欺詐性地增加支票金額」？

example.text: He kited many checks.

translation.zh-Hant: 他盜走了很多支支票。

meaning.en: Increase the amount (of a check) fraudulently.
meaning.zh-Hant: 欺詐性地增加支票金額。

example.text: The kite soared high above the fields, its wings glinting in the sunlight.

translation.zh-Hant: 風箏高高地在田野上翱翔，它的翅膀在陽光下閃閃發光。

meaning.en: Any of several small graceful hawks of the family Accipitridae having long pointed wings and feeding on insects and small animals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 屬於鷹科的幾種小型優雅的鷹，它們有長而尖的翅膀，以昆蟲和小動物為食。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在人類中，關節或關節的中間部位，即大腿和小腿之間的區域」？

example.text: After a long run, she visited the doctor to check her knee joint for any injuries.

translation.zh-Hant: 長時間跑步後，她去看醫生檢查膝蓋關節是否有任何損傷。

meaning.en: In humans, the joint or the region of the joint in the middle part of the leg between the thigh and the shank.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在人類中，關節或關節的中間部位，即大腿和小腿之間的區域。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用刀」？

example.text: He stabbed the knife into the ground.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把刀刺進了地上。

meaning.en: Use a knife on.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用刀。

example.text: The knife is a long thin projection on the table.

translation.zh-Hant: 刀是桌子上的一個長而細的投影。

meaning.en: Any long thin projection that is transient.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何短暫的長而細的投影。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「已經牢牢記在心裡了」？

example.text: I know Latin.

translation.zh-Hant: 我懂拉丁語。

meaning.en: Have fixed in the mind.
meaning.zh-Hant: 已經牢牢記在心裡了。

example.text: He is always in the know.

translation.zh-Hant: 他總是瞭解情況。

meaning.en: The fact of being aware of information that is known to few people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 意識到很少有人知道的資訊的事實。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「瞭解某事的事實；對某個主題、地方、情況等的一般理解或熟悉」？

example.text: He has a lot of knowledge on the Indus Valley Civilization.

translation.zh-Hant: 他對印度河文明瞭解很多。

meaning.en: The fact of knowing about something; general understanding or familiarity with a subject, place, situation etc.
meaning.zh-Hant: 瞭解某事的事實；對某個主題、地方、情況等的一般理解或熟悉。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有生產力的工作（特別是以工資為報酬的體力勞動）」？

example.text: He is engaged in physical labor all day.

translation.zh-Hant: 他整天都在做體力勞動。

meaning.en: Productive work (especially physical work done for wages).
meaning.zh-Hant: 有生產力的工作（特別是以工資為報酬的體力勞動）。

example.text: I'm not fit for physical labor.

translation.zh-Hant: 我不適合做體力勞動。

meaning.en: Strive and make an effort to reach a goal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 努力並做出努力來實現一個目標。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任何女性的禮貌名字」？

example.text: A nice lady at the library helped me.

translation.zh-Hant: 圖書館裡的一位好女士幫了我。

meaning.en: A polite name for any woman.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何女性的禮貌名字。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「根據其地形、地理（和建築）特徵定義的部分土地或領土」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她喜歡畫風景。

meaning.zh-Hant: 根據其地形、地理（和建築）特徵定義的部分土地或領土。

example.text: She paints landscapes in her spare time.

translation.zh-Hant: 她空閒時間畫風景。

meaning.en: Do landscape gardening.
meaning.zh-Hant: 做景觀園藝。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種用於命名特定學科事物的一種詞彙系統」？

example.text: The language of the discipline is complex.

translation.zh-Hant: 該學科的語言很複雜。

meaning.en: A system of words used to name things in a particular discipline.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種用於命名特定學科事物的一種詞彙系統。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在規模、數量、數量、規模或範圍方面均高於平均水準」？

translation.zh-Hant: 這個尺寸對我來說太大了。

meaning.en: In a boastful manner.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以自負的方式。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「（特別用於人）即將過去的」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我們已故的總統仍然非常活躍。

meaning.zh-Hant: （特別用於人）即將過去的。

translation.zh-Hant: 火車今天早上晚點出發了。

meaning.en: Later than usual or than expected.
meaning.zh-Hant: 比平時或預期的晚。

example.text: I want to become a lawyer after graduating from law school.

translation.zh-Hant: 我畢業於法學院後想成為一名律師。

meaning.en: The learned profession that is mastered by graduate study in a law school and that is responsible for the judicial system.
meaning.zh-Hant: 這是一項由法律學院研究生學習掌握的專業，負責司法系統。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不願意工作或努力」？

translation.zh-Hant: 太懶了，不想洗碗。

meaning.en: Disinclined to work or exertion.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不願意工作或努力。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「指向可能解決方案的證據」？

translation.zh-Hant: 偵探追蹤了線索，並逮捕了嫌疑人。

meaning.zh-Hant: 指向可能解決方案的證據。

translation.zh-Hant: 團隊主管決定帶領團隊取得勝利。

meaning.en: Cause to undertake a certain action.
meaning.zh-Hant: 採取某種行動的原因。

plainExpression: Any person who leads or directs

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任何主管或指導的人」？

translation.zh-Hant: 總統是國家的主管人。

meaning.en: Any person who leads or directs.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何主管或指導的人。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常是綠色且扁平的器官，代表了大多數莖本植物最突出的特徵」？

example.text: I found a beautiful leaf on the ground.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在地上發現了一片美麗的葉子。

meaning.zh-Hant: 通常是綠色且扁平的器官，代表了大多數莖本植物最突出的特徵。

translation.zh-Hant: 「翻閱一本書」這句話展示了葉子在上下文中的用法。

senseRefs: en:sheet of paper comprising two pages

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「瞭解或意識到，通常是偶然的」？

example.text: I want to learn a new language this year.

translation.zh-Hant: 今年我想學一種新語言。

meaning.en: Get to know or become aware of, usually accidentally.
meaning.zh-Hant: 瞭解或意識到，通常是偶然的。

plainExpression: A tough material produced from the skin of

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種由動物皮革透過鞣製或類似工藝製成的堅硬材料，例如用於服裝；通常表示牛皮，除非其他條件說明不同」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她為她的新工作買了一件皮夾克。

meaning.en: A tough material produced from the skin of animals, by tanning or similar process, used e.g. for clothing; often denotes leather from cattle when no qualifier specifies otherwise.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種由動物皮革透過鞣製或類似工藝製成的堅硬材料，例如用於服裝；通常表示牛皮，除非其他條件說明不同。

example.text: The farmer whipped the horse with a leather strap.

translation.zh-Hant: 農民用皮帶鞭打馬。

meaning.en: Whip with a leather strap.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用皮帶製成的鞭子。

plainExpression: leave unchanged or undisturbed or refrain from taking

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘leave unchanged or undisturbed or refrain from taking’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「保持不變或不打擾，或避免服用」？

example.text: Please leave the door open when you leave the room.

translation.zh-Hant: 離開房間時請把門開著。

meaning.zh-Hant: 保持不變或不打擾，或避免服用。

example.text: He took his leave.

translation.zh-Hant: 他請假了。

meaning.en: The act of departing politely.
meaning.zh-Hant: 禮貌地離開的行為。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「位置靠近或朝向左側；即當人或物體面向東時，即北側」？

example.text: He sat on the left side of the couch.

translation.zh-Hant: 他坐在沙發的左邊。

meaning.zh-Hant: 位置靠近或朝向左側；即當人或物體面向東時，即北側。

example.text: The left side of the table was unused.

translation.zh-Hant: 桌子的左側沒有使用。

meaning.en: Not used up.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沒有用完。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專為左手設計」？

example.text: She held the lemon in her left-hand.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用左手拿著檸檬。

meaning.en: Intended for the left hand.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專為左手設計。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「自由選擇消遣或愉快的活動」？

example.text: He enjoyed his leisure time playing sports.

translation.zh-Hant: 他喜歡在空閒時間玩運動。

meaning.en: Freedom to choose a pastime or enjoyable activity.
meaning.zh-Hant: 自由選擇消遣或愉快的活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘A yellowish citrus fruit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種黃色的柑橘類水果」？

example.text: She squeezed a fresh lemon into the lemonade.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把一顆新鮮的檸檬榨進了檸檬。

meaning.en: A yellowish citrus fruit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種黃色的柑橘類水果。

plainExpression: give temporarily; let have for a limited time

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘give temporarily; let have for a limited time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「暫時提供；讓有限時間使用」？

example.text: He decided to lend her his book for a week.

translation.zh-Hant: 他決定把他的書借給她一個星期。

meaning.en: Give temporarily; let have for a limited time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 暫時提供；讓有限時間使用。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「指示教學」？

example.text: It will be a lesson to him.

translation.zh-Hant: 這將對他來說是一次教訓。

meaning.zh-Hant: 指示教學。

example.text: Students are encouraged to conduct individual study to enhance their understanding of the lesson material.

translation.zh-Hant: 鼓勵學生進行個人學習，以增強他們對課程材料的理解。

meaning.en: A task assigned for individual study.
meaning.zh-Hant: 分配給個人學習的任務。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「同意，給予許可；允許」？

example.text: I won't let the police search her basement.

translation.zh-Hant: 我不會讓警察搜查她的地下室。

meaning.zh-Hant: 同意，給予許可；允許。

example.text: Let me give you an example.

translation.zh-Hant: 讓我給你舉個例子。

meaning.en: A serve that strikes the net before falling into the receiver's court; the ball must be served again.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在落入接球者球場之前擊中網的發球；球必須再次發球。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「致某人或組織的書面訊息」？

example.text: I sent a letter to my friend.

translation.zh-Hant: 我給我的朋友寄了一封信。

meaning.zh-Hant: 致某人或組織的書面訊息。

example.text: She writes letters to her cousins.

translation.zh-Hant: 她給她的表兄弟姐妹寫信。

meaning.en: Mark letters on or mark with letters.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在上面標記字母或用字母標記。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與水準線垂直的平面」？

example.text: The phrase “Park the car on the level” shows how level is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「把車停在平地上」這句話展示了「平地上」這個詞在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.zh-Hant: 與水準線垂直的平面。

example.text: She scored a level of 70 in the contest.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在比賽中得了70分。

meaning.en: Of the score in a contest.
meaning.zh-Hant: 比賽中的分數。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘freedom of choice’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「選擇自由」？

example.text: The phrase “Liberty of opinion” shows how liberty is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「言論自由」一詞表明了自由如何在上下文中被使用。

meaning.en: Freedom of choice.
meaning.zh-Hant: 選擇自由。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘room with books’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個存放書籍的房間」？

example.text: He visited the library to find a good book.

translation.zh-Hant: 他去圖書館找一本好書。

meaning.en: A room where books are kept.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個存放書籍的房間。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正式授權」？

example.text: I need to obtain a license to drive.

translation.zh-Hant: 我需要拿到駕照才能開車。

meaning.zh-Hant: 正式授權。

example.text: When liberty becomes license, dictatorship is near.

translation.zh-Hant: 當自由變成許可證時，獨裁統治就近在咫尺。

meaning.en: Excessive freedom; lack of due restraint.
meaning.zh-Hant: 過度的自由；缺乏適當的約束。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘tell a lie’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「說謊；故意假裝來欺騙」？

example.text: She lied about her age to get a better job.

translation.zh-Hant: 她為了找到一份更好的工作而撒謊說了自己的年齡。

meaning.zh-Hant: 說謊；故意假裝來欺騙。

example.text: The statement was a lie and contradicted the facts.

translation.zh-Hant: 這份宣告是謊言，與事實相矛盾。

meaning.en: A statement that deviates from or perverts the truth.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個偏離或扭曲真相的陳述。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「監禁期限長達囚犯一生」？

example.text: He received a life sentence for his crimes.

translation.zh-Hant: 他因犯罪被判處終身監禁。

meaning.en: A prison term lasting as long as the prisoner lives.
meaning.zh-Hant: 監禁期限長達囚犯一生。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「百合科百合屬的幾種花之一，其中包括許多觀賞性物種」？

example.text: Lily flower blooms in spring.

translation.zh-Hant: 百合花在春天盛開。

meaning.en: Any of several flowers in the genus Lilium of the family Liliaceae, which includes a great many ornamental species.
meaning.zh-Hant: 百合科百合屬的幾種花之一，其中包括許多觀賞性物種。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「你生活中賺錢的主要活動」？

example.text: He's not in my line of business.

translation.zh-Hant: 他不在我的業務範圍內。

meaning.en: The principal activity in your life that you do to earn money.
meaning.zh-Hant: 你生活中賺錢的主要活動。

example.text: Seam is the thin line of stitching that joins two pieces of fabric together.

translation.zh-Hant: 接縫是將兩塊布料連線在一起的細縫線。

meaning.en: Reinforce with fabric.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用織物加固。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「大貓科的獅子（Panthera leo）原產於非洲、印度和以前的大部分歐洲」？

example.text: The lion is a big cat that lives in Africa and India.

translation.zh-Hant: 獅子是一種生活在非洲和印度的大型貓科動物。

meaning.en: A big cat, Panthera leo, native to Africa, India and formerly much of Europe.
meaning.zh-Hant: 大貓科的獅子（Panthera leo）原產於非洲、印度和以前的大部分歐洲。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「有目的地傾聽」？

example.text: Listen to the sound of this cello.

translation.zh-Hant: 聽聽這把大提琴的聲音。

meaning.en: Hear with intention.
meaning.zh-Hant: 有目的地傾聽。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「數量、數量、規模或範圍有限或低於平均水準」？

example.text: There was a little bit of sugar left in the cup.

translation.zh-Hant: 杯子裡還剩下一點糖。

meaning.en: Limited or below average in number or quantity or magnitude or extent.
meaning.zh-Hant: 數量、數量、規模或範圍有限或低於平均水準。

example.text: He carried a little bag of groceries.

translation.zh-Hant: 他揹著一個小袋雜貨。

meaning.en: A small amount or duration.
meaning.zh-Hant: 少量或短時間。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「充滿活力和精力」？

example.text: The lively crowd cheered as the band played.

translation.zh-Hant: 當樂隊演奏時，熱鬧的人群歡呼雀躍。

meaning.en: Full of life and energy.
meaning.zh-Hant: 充滿活力和精力。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與活著的人有關」？

example.text: The phrase “Within living memory” shows how living is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「在活著的記憶中」這句話表明了生活是如何在上下文中使用的。

meaning.en: Pertaining to living persons.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與活著的人有關。

example.text: The phrase “Within living memory” shows how living is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「在活著的記憶中」這句話表明了生活是如何在上下文中使用的。

meaning.en: The experience of being alive; the course of human events and activities.
meaning.zh-Hant: 活著的經驗；人類事件和活動的過程。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一次可以處理或運輸的數量」？

example.text: He carried a large load of books to the library.

translation.zh-Hant: 他背著一大堆書去圖書館。

meaning.en: A quantity that can be processed or transported at one time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一次可以處理或運輸的數量。

example.text: The system broke down under excessive loads.

translation.zh-Hant: 系統在過度負載下出現故障。

meaning.en: Corrupt, debase, or make impure by adding a foreign or inferior substance; often by replacing valuable ingredients with inferior ones.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過加入外來或劣質物質來腐敗、降低品質或使物質變質；通常透過用劣質成分取代有價值的成分。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「屬於或特徵於特定地方或社群」？

example.text: The phrase “Local customs” shows how local is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「當地習俗」一詞表明了當地習俗在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: Of or belonging to or characteristic of a particular locality or neighborhood.
meaning.zh-Hant: 屬於或特徵於特定地方或社群。

example.text: She took the local bus to the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 她坐當地公車去了車站。

meaning.en: Public transport consisting of a bus or train that stops at all stations or stops.
meaning.zh-Hant: 公共交通包括一輛在所有車站或站點停靠的公共汽車或火車。

plainExpression: In agreement with the principles of logic; sequacious

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘In agreement with the principles of logic; sequacious’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「符合邏輯原則；順序性」？

example.text: The logical sequence of events in the movie was impeccable.

translation.zh-Hant: 電影中事件的邏輯順序無可挑剔。

meaning.en: In agreement with the principles of logic; sequacious.
meaning.zh-Hant: 符合邏輯原則；順序性。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由於感到與其他人隔絕，感到不快樂」？

example.text: I was lonely without her.

translation.zh-Hant: 沒有她，我很孤獨。

meaning.en: Unhappy due to feeling isolated from contact with other people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由於感到與其他人隔絕，感到不快樂。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要是指時間感；表示相對較長或超過平均時間長度或時間段，或指所指定的時間長度」？

translation.zh-Hant: 「長壽」一詞表明了它在上下文中被用得有多久。

meaning.zh-Hant: 主要是指時間感；表示相對較長或超過平均時間長度或時間段，或指所指定的時間長度。

example.text: We will meet at the park at 7 PM for a long walk together.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們將在晚上7點在公園見面，一起散步。

meaning.en: For an extended time or at a distant time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在很長時間或遙遠的時間。

plainExpression: perceive with attention; direct one's gaze towards; look

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專注地感知；將目光轉向；看」？

example.text: She decided to look at the stars and admire their beauty.

translation.zh-Hant: 她決定看星星，欣賞它們的美麗。

meaning.en: Perceive with attention; direct one's gaze towards; look.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專注地感知；將目光轉向；看。

example.text: He went out to have a look.

translation.zh-Hant: 他出去看看了。

meaning.en: The act of directing the eyes toward something and perceiving it visually; look.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將目光轉向某物並用視覺方式感知它的行為；看。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不緊；不緊密地受限或收縮或收縮」？

example.text: The loose-fitting clothes made me feel comfortable.

translation.zh-Hant: 寬鬆的衣服讓我感到很舒服。

meaning.en: Not tight; not closely constrained or constricted or constricting.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不緊；不緊密地受限或收縮或收縮。

example.text: Cows in India are running loose.

translation.zh-Hant: 印度的奶牛跑得很開。

meaning.en: Without restraint.
meaning.zh-Hant: 沒有約束。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「讓它消失在視線或腦海中」？

example.text: Lose the crowds by climbing a mountain.

translation.zh-Hant: 爬上山來避開人群。

meaning.en: Allow to go out of sight or mind.
meaning.zh-Hant: 讓它消失在視線或腦海中。

plainExpression: unable to be found or recovered

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘unable to be found or recovered’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不再在你手中或控制之中；無法找到或恢復」？

example.text: The phrase “A lost child” shows how lost is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「一個迷路的孩子」這句話展示了「迷路」在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: No longer in your possession or control; unable to be found or recovered.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不再在你手中或控制之中；無法找到或恢復。

example.text: some people in the village are believed to be lost in the mountains and destined to die soon.

translation.zh-Hant: 據信村裡的一些人迷失在山上，註定很快就會死去。

meaning.en: People who are destined to die soon.
meaning.zh-Hant: 那些註定很快就要死去的人。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「（通常後跟「of」）大量或數量或程度」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我在市場買了很多蘋果。

meaning.zh-Hant: （通常後跟「of」）大量或數量或程度。

example.text: She decided to give a lot of money to charity.

translation.zh-Hant: 她決定把很多錢捐給慈善機構。

meaning.en: Administer or bestow, as in small portions.
meaning.zh-Hant: 管理或授予，就像少量一樣。

plainExpression: In a loud manner; at a high volume

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘In a loud manner; at a high volume’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以大聲的方式；以高音量」？

example.text: He spoke loudly to make his point heard.

translation.zh-Hant: 他大聲說話，以便讓他的觀點被聽到。

meaning.en: In a loud manner; at a high volume.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以大聲的方式；以高音量。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「墜入愛河或愛上」？

example.text: He loves his girlfriend very much.

translation.zh-Hant: 他非常愛他的女朋友。

meaning.zh-Hant: 墜入愛河或愛上。

translation.zh-Hant: 幾個月來，他沒有感受到任何愛。

meaning.en: Sexual activities (often including sexual intercourse) between two people.
meaning.zh-Hant: 兩個人之間的性活動（通常包括性交）。

plainExpression: Delightful for beauty, harmony, or grace

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「令人愉悅的美麗、和諧或優雅」？

translation.zh-Hant: 她穿了一件漂亮的連衣裙去參加派對。

meaning.zh-Hant: 令人愉悅的美麗、和諧或優雅。

example.text: He had a lovely voice.

translation.zh-Hant: 他有一種可愛的聲音。

meaning.en: A very pretty girl who works as a photographer's model.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個非常漂亮的女孩，她是一名攝影師的模特。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以浪漫的方式愛和關心另一個人的人；甜心、愛、靈魂伴侶、男朋友、女朋友或配偶」？

translation.zh-Hant: 他是一個忠實的家庭愛人。

translation.zh-Hant: 一股低氣壓一夜之間移動而來，帶來了冰雹和降雪。

meaning.zh-Hant: 低壓氣團；通常會帶來降水。

translation.zh-Hant: 也許是空氣壓低，這意味著你在飛機上更容易喝醉。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「你生活中的整體環境或狀況（包括發生在你身上的所有事情）」？

translation.zh-Hant: 「愛爾蘭人的幸運」這句話展示了幸運是如何在上下文中使用的。

meaning.zh-Hant: 你生活中的整體環境或狀況（包括發生在你身上的所有事情）。

example.text: I'm so lucky to have such a great friend.

translation.zh-Hant: 我很幸運有這麼好的朋友。

meaning.en: Having or bringing good fortune.
meaning.zh-Hant: 擁有或帶來好運。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「午餐的習慣或習慣時間」？

translation.zh-Hant: 他遵守著定期的午餐時間。

meaning.zh-Hant: 午餐的習慣或習慣時間。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與音樂劇有關或是音樂劇」？

example.text: The phrase “The lyric stage” shows how lyric is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「抒情階段」一詞表明了抒情是如何在上下文中使用的。

meaning.en: Relating to or being musical drama.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與音樂劇有關或是音樂劇。

example.text: He read the lyric poem aloud to his friends.

translation.zh-Hant: 他向他的朋友們大聲朗讀了這首抒情詩。

meaning.en: The text of a popular song or musical-comedy number.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一首流行歌曲或音樂喜劇的歌詞。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種將能量引導和控制的裝置，通常以運動或電的形式產生某種效果」？

translation.zh-Hant: 這臺機器用於生產商品。

meaning.zh-Hant: 一種將能量引導和控制的裝置，通常以運動或電的形式產生某種效果。

translation.zh-Hant: 我們會製造一臺新機器來提高效率。

meaning.en: Make by machinery.
meaning.zh-Hant: 機械製造。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以不受控制的興奮或情緒為標誌」？

example.text: The phrase “A mad whirl of pleasure” shows how mad is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「一場瘋狂的快樂旋風」這句話展示了「瘋狂」在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.zh-Hant: 以不受控制的興奮或情緒為標誌。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「產品由平裝本定期出版物作為實物組成」？

translation.zh-Hant: 我正在讀一本關於旅遊的雜誌。

meaning.en: Product consisting of a paperback periodic publication as a physical object.
meaning.zh-Hant: 產品由平裝本定期出版物作為實物組成。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擁有歸因於魔法的神奇才能、屬性或品質」？

example.text: He is a wizard who can perform magic tricks.

translation.zh-Hant: 他是一位會表演魔術的巫師。

meaning.zh-Hant: 擁有歸因於魔法的神奇才能、屬性或品質。

translation.zh-Hant: Sami嘗試了一些簡單的魔術。

meaning.en: An illusory feat; considered magical by naive observers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一項虛幻的壯舉；被天真的觀察者認為是神奇的。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「作為一個人的主要研究領域」？

example.text: The major in engineering is a very good choice for the future.

translation.zh-Hant: 工程專業是未來的一個非常好的選擇。

meaning.zh-Hant: 作為一個人的主要研究領域。

example.text: A major in computer science is much larger than a major in biology.

translation.zh-Hant: 電腦科學專業比生物學專業要大得多。

meaning.en: Greater in number or size or amount.
meaning.zh-Hant: 數量、大小或金額更大。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「創作或代表」？

example.text: He will make a new toy for his son.

translation.zh-Hant: 他會給他的兒子做一個新玩具。

meaning.zh-Hant: 創作或代表。

example.text: She is a skilled chef, making delicious meals.

translation.zh-Hant: 她是一位熟練的廚師，能做出美味的飯菜。

meaning.en: A recognizable kind.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種可識別的種類。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「製造的人；製造或生產某物的人或事物」？

example.text: The baker is a master maker of bread.

translation.zh-Hant: 麵包師是一位出色的麵包製造師。

meaning.en: Someone who makes; a person or thing that makes or produces something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 製造的人；製造或生產某物的人或事物。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「該詞的通用用法是指任何人類」？

translation.zh-Hant: 每個人都為自己著想。

meaning.zh-Hant: 該詞的通用用法是指任何人類。

example.text: We cannot man all the desks.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們不能為所有的桌子安排人員。

meaning.en: Provide with workers.

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責、採取行動或處理」？

translation.zh-Hant: 經理將有效地管理團隊。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個負責管理某事的人，比如企業、餐廳或體育隊」？

example.text: He is a successful manager of the company.

translation.zh-Hant: 他是公司的成功經理。

meaning.zh-Hant: 一個負責管理某事的人，比如企業、餐廳或體育隊。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「作用方式；執行或做任何事情的方式」？

example.text: She has a polite manner of speaking.

translation.zh-Hant: 她說話很有禮貌。

meaning.en: Mode of action; way of performing or doing anything.
meaning.zh-Hant: 作用方式；執行或做任何事情的方式。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘draw a map’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「製作地圖；展示或確定細節的特徵」？

example.text: She will draw a map of the city for her project.

translation.zh-Hant: 她會為她的專案畫一張城市的地圖。

meaning.zh-Hant: 製作地圖；展示或確定細節的特徵。

example.text: He studied the earth map to understand the geography of the region.

translation.zh-Hant: 他研究了地球地圖，以瞭解該地區的地理。

meaning.en: A diagrammatic representation of the earth's surface (or part of it).
meaning.zh-Hant: 地球表面的圖形表示（或其一部分）。

plainExpression: moving or capable of moving readily

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘moving or capable of moving readily’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能夠移動或容易移動（特別是從一個地方移動到另一個地方）」？

example.text: She uses a mobile phone to communicate with friends.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用手機和朋友交流。

meaning.en: Moving or capable of moving readily (especially from place to place).
meaning.zh-Hant: 能夠移動或容易移動（特別是從一個地方移動到另一個地方）。

example.text: I saw a mobile sculpture on display in the museum.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在博物館裡看到了一件移動雕塑。

meaning.en: Sculpture suspended in midair whose delicately balanced parts can be set in motion by air currents.
meaning.zh-Hant: 懸浮在半空中的雕塑，其精緻平衡的部分可以被風流動動。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對複雜實體或過程的假設描述」？

example.text: He studied the model to understand the structure of the building.

translation.zh-Hant: 他研究了模型，以瞭解建築物的結構。

meaning.en: A hypothetical description of a complex entity or process.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對複雜實體或過程的假設描述。

example.text: The model of the car was very realistic and worthy of imitation.

translation.zh-Hant: 這輛車的模型非常逼真，值得模仿。

meaning.en: Worthy of imitation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 值得模仿。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「屬於現代時代；自中世紀以來」？

example.text: She prefers modern art over traditional art.

translation.zh-Hant: 她更喜歡現代藝術而不是傳統藝術。

meaning.en: Belonging to the modern era; since the Middle Ages.
meaning.zh-Hant: 屬於現代時代；自中世紀以來。

example.text: He used a modern typeface for his business card.

translation.zh-Hant: 他用一種現代的字型製作了名片。

meaning.en: A typeface (based on an 18th century design by Gianbattista Bodoni) distinguished by regular shape and hairline serifs and heavy downstrokes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種字型（基於Gianbattista Bodoni 18 世紀的設計），其特點是規則的形狀、髮線斜體和重疊的線條。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘at this time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在這個時候」？

example.text: I'll meet you at the moment.

translation.zh-Hant: 我現在會在等你。

meaning.en: At this time.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在這個時候。

plainExpression: A generally accepted means of exchange

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘A generally accepted means of exchange’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種普遍接受的交換手段」？

example.text: I need some money to buy groceries.

translation.zh-Hant: 我需要一些錢來買雜貨。

meaning.en: A generally accepted means of exchange.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種普遍接受的交換手段。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「屬於Simiiformes分支的成員，除了包含猿類的Hominoidea分支之外，它們通常（但不一定）以體型小、尾巴和臉頰袋為特徵」？

example.text: I saw a monkey swinging from the tree.

translation.zh-Hant: 我看到一隻猴子從樹上搖擺著。

meaning.en: A member of the clade Simiiformes other than those in the clade Hominoidea containing apes, generally (but not universally) distinguished by small size, tails, and cheek pouches.
meaning.zh-Hant: 屬於Simiiformes分支的成員，除了包含猿類的Hominoidea分支之外，它們通常（但不一定）以體型小、尾巴和臉頰袋為特徵。

example.text: A man can no more become a woman than a monkey can develop into a man.

translation.zh-Hant: 一個男人不能變成女人，就像一隻猴子不能變成男人一樣。

meaning.en: Do random, unplanned work or activities or spend time idly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 做隨機、未計劃的工作或活動，或空閒地花時間。

plainExpression: a time unit of approximately 30 days

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a time unit of approximately 30 days’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個大約30天的時間單位」？

example.text: Next month is October.

translation.zh-Hant: 下個月是十月。

meaning.en: A time unit of approximately 30 days.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個大約30天的時間單位。

plainExpression: A mental or emotional state, composure

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘A mental or emotional state, composure’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「精神或情緒狀態，鎮定」？

example.text: I'm in a good mood today.

translation.zh-Hant: 我今天心情很好。

meaning.en: A mental or emotional state, composure.
meaning.zh-Hant: 精神或情緒狀態，鎮定。

plainExpression: any natural satellite of a planet

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘any natural satellite of a planet’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「行星的任何天然衛星」？

example.text: The moon is shining brightly in the sky.

translation.zh-Hant: 月亮在天空中閃閃發光。

meaning.en: Any natural satellite of a planet.
meaning.zh-Hant: 行星的任何天然衛星。

example.text: The moon is around the Earth.

translation.zh-Hant: 月亮圍繞著地球。

meaning.en: Expose one's buttocks to.
meaning.zh-Hant: 露出自己的臀部。

plainExpression: the time period between dawn and noon

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the time period between dawn and noon’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「黎明和中午之間的時間段」？

example.text: It's time for breakfast in the morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 現在是早上吃早餐的時候了。

meaning.en: The time period between dawn and noon.
meaning.zh-Hant: 黎明和中午之間的時間段。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「很多的最高等級」？

example.text: I spent most time in Rome because most of Venice is flooded.

translation.zh-Hant: 我大部分時間都花在了羅馬，因為威尼斯的大部分地區都被淹沒了。

meaning.en: Superlative degree of much.
meaning.zh-Hant: 很多的最高等級。

example.text: I prefer to eat the most delicious food.

translation.zh-Hant: 我更喜歡吃最美味的食物。

meaning.en: The superlative of ‘much’ that can be used with mass nouns and is usually preceded by ‘the’; a quantifier meaning the greatest in amount or extent or degree.
meaning.zh-Hant: 「很多」的最高階詞可用於大數名詞，通常以「the」開頭；是一個量詞，表示數量、程度或程度的最大值。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要或主要；大多數時候；通常，一般來說，總體而言」？

example.text: I mostly enjoy reading books.

translation.zh-Hant: 我主要喜歡看書。

meaning.en: Mainly or chiefly; for the most part; usually, generally, on the whole.
meaning.zh-Hant: 主要或主要；大多數時候；通常，一般來說，總體而言。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生過孩子的女人（也用作對你母親的稱呼）」？

example.text: I'm going to visit my mother tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 我明天要去看望我媽媽。

meaning.en: A woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother).
meaning.zh-Hant: 生過孩子的女人（也用作對你母親的稱呼）。

example.text: The phrase “Who helps your mother” shows how mother is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「誰幫助你媽媽」這句話展示了母親在上下文中的用法。

meaning.en: Make (offspring) by reproduction.
meaning.zh-Hant: 透過繁殖來產生（後代）。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「相當大的地勢，或多或少突然上升，在風景中形成一個顯眼的形狀，通常在山頂處只有很小的地面面積」？

example.text: We hiked to the top of the mountain for a breathtaking view.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們徒步爬到山頂，欣賞壯麗的景色。

meaning.en: An elevation of land of considerable dimensions rising more or less abruptly, forming a conspicuous figure in the landscape, usually having a small extent of surface at its summit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 相當大的地勢，或多或少突然上升，在風景中形成一個顯眼的形狀，通常在山頂處只有很小的地面面積。

plainExpression: Any small rodent of the genus Mus

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Any small rodent of the genus Mus’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任何Mus屬的小哺乳動物」？

example.text: I found a tiny mouse in my attic.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在閣樓裡發現了一隻小老鼠。

meaning.en: Any small rodent of the genus Mus.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何Mus屬的小哺乳動物。

example.text: The mouse moved stealthily across the table.

translation.zh-Hant: 老鼠悄悄地在桌子上移動。

meaning.en: To go stealthily or furtively.
meaning.zh-Hant: 悄聲低語或偷偷摸摸地行動。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「食物進入並發出聲音的開口」？

example.text: He stuffed his mouth with candy.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把糖果塞滿了嘴。

meaning.en: The opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge.
meaning.zh-Hant: 食物進入並發出聲音的開口。

example.text: He stuffed his mouth with candy.

translation.zh-Hant: 他把糖果塞滿了嘴。

meaning.en: Express in speech.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用言語表達。

senseRefs: en:represent (words or sounds) orally but soundlessly
en:move the mouth or form (words) with the mouth, with or without sound
en:utter in a loud discordant voice

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「改變位置或姿勢；以任何方式從一個地方或位置移動到另一個地方或位置」？

example.text: She moved her chair to the other side of the room.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把椅子移到了房間的另一邊。

meaning.en: To change place or posture; to go, in any manner, from one place or position to another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 改變位置或姿勢；以任何方式從一個地方或位置移動到另一個地方或位置。

example.text: He didn't make a move to help.

translation.zh-Hant: 他沒有做出任何幫助的舉動。

meaning.en: The act of deciding to do something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 決定做某事的事實。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種透過聲音和一系列影象來呈現故事的娛樂形式，營造出連續運動的錯覺」？

example.text: We watched a thrilling movie together last night.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們昨晚一起看了部令人激動的電影。

meaning.en: A form of entertainment that enacts a story by sound and a sequence of images giving the illusion of continuous movement.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種透過聲音和一系列影象來呈現故事的娛樂形式，營造出連續運動的錯覺。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a great amount or extent’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「大量或程度」？

example.text: They did much for humanity.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們為人類做了很多事情。

meaning.en: A great amount or extent.
meaning.zh-Hant: 大量或程度。

example.text: The phrase “Not much rain” shows how much is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「沒有太多雨」這句話表明了它在上下文中被用得有多廣泛。

meaning.en: (quantifier used with mass nouns) great in quantity or degree or extent.
meaning.zh-Hant: （用於品質名詞的量詞）在數量、程度或範圍上都很出色。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用槍指著或威脅暴力搶劫」？

example.text: I was mugged in the streets of New York last night.

translation.zh-Hant: 我昨晚在紐約街上被劫持了。

meaning.en: Rob at gunpoint or with the threat of violence.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用槍指著或威脅暴力搶劫。

example.text: I have a mug with a handle.

translation.zh-Hant: 我有一個帶把手的馬克杯。

meaning.en: With handle and usually cylindrical.
meaning.zh-Hant: 帶有手柄，通常是圓柱形的。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「非法殺害他人，特別是預先確定殺害他人的罪行」？

example.text: He was convicted of murder.

translation.zh-Hant: 他被判犯有謀殺罪。

meaning.en: The crime of killing a person unlawfully, especially with predetermination.
meaning.zh-Hant: 非法殺害他人，特別是預先確定殺害他人的罪行。

example.text: The tourists murdered the French language.

translation.zh-Hant: 遊客殺死了法語。

meaning.en: Alter so as to make unrecognizable.
meaning.zh-Hant: 改變以使其無法辨認。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「任何令人愉快（令人愉快和和諧）的聲音」？

example.text: He fell asleep to the music of the wind chimes.

translation.zh-Hant: 他聽著風鈴的音樂睡著了。

meaning.en: Any agreeable (pleasing and harmonious) sounds.
meaning.zh-Hant: 任何令人愉快（令人愉快和和諧）的聲音。

plainExpression: characterized by or capable of producing music

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘characterized by or capable of producing music’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以創作音樂為特徵或能夠創作音樂為特徵」？

example.text: The phrase “A musical evening” shows how musical is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「音樂之夜」一詞表明了音樂在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: Characterized by or capable of producing music.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以創作音樂為特徵或能夠創作音樂為特徵。

example.text: The phrase “A musical evening” shows how musical is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「音樂之夜」一詞表明了音樂在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: A play or film whose action and dialogue is interspersed with singing and dancing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一部動作和對話與唱歌和跳舞交織在一起的戲劇或電影。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「音樂作曲家、指揮家或表演者；具體來說，一個以唱歌和/或演奏樂器為愛好、職業或職業的人」？

example.text: Jenny is a talented musician, playing the cello, saxophone, piano and guitar.

translation.zh-Hant: Jenny是一位才華橫溢的音樂家，演奏大提琴、薩克斯風、鋼琴和吉他。

meaning.en: A composer, conductor, or performer of music; specifically, a person who sings and/or plays a musical instrument as a hobby, occupation, or profession.
meaning.zh-Hant: 音樂作曲家、指揮家或表演者；具體來說，一個以唱歌和/或演奏樂器為愛好、職業或職業的人。

primarySenseID: en:modal auxiliary, for requirement, necessity, etc

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「作為要求；表示句子主語需要作為命令或指示來執行句子賦語，如果不這樣做，將導致失敗或負面後果」？

example.text: Everybody told me I must stop worrying, but I couldn't, because I felt there must be something wrong.

translation.zh-Hant: 每個人都告訴我我必須停止擔心，但我做不到，因為我覺得一定有什麼不對勁。

senses.id: en:modal auxiliary, for requirement, necessity, etc

meaning.en: To do as a requirement; indicates that the sentence subject is required as an imperative or directive to execute the sentence predicate, with failure to do so resulting in a failure or negative consequence.
meaning.zh-Hant: 作為要求；表示句子主語需要作為命令或指示來執行句子賦語，如果不這樣做，將導致失敗或負面後果。

example.text: A book that is must reading.

translation.zh-Hant: 一本必讀的書。

meaning.en: Highly recommended.
meaning.zh-Hant: 強烈推薦。

senseRefs: en:modal auxiliary, for requirement, necessity, etc
en:modal auxiliary, for probability or certainty about past event
en:modal auxiliary, for probability or certainty about ongoing event

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Of unknown origin’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「起源不明」？

example.text: He received a mysterious phone call this morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 他今天早上接到了一個神秘的電話。

meaning.en: Of unknown origin.
meaning.zh-Hant: 起源不明。

plainExpression: something that baffles understanding and cannot be explained

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘something that baffles understanding and cannot be explained’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一些令人難以理解和無法解釋的事情」？

example.text: How it got out is a mystery.

translation.zh-Hant: 它是如何洩露出去的是一個謎。

meaning.en: Something that baffles understanding and cannot be explained.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一些令人難以理解和無法解釋的事情。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「餐巾紙；一塊（通常是長方形）的布料或紙，用於餐桌上擦拭嘴巴和手，以保持清潔」？

example.text: T.T. please don’t forget Amy’s napkin.

translation.zh-Hant: T.T. 請不要忘記Amy的餐巾紙。

meaning.en: A serviette; a (usually rectangular) piece of cloth or paper used at the table for wiping the mouth and hands for cleanliness while eating.
meaning.zh-Hant: 餐巾紙；一塊（通常是長方形）的布料或紙，用於餐桌上擦拭嘴巴和手，以保持清潔。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個由單一政府統治的政治組織的人群」？

example.text: The phrase “African nations” shows how nation is used in context.

translation.zh-Hant: 「非洲國家」一詞表明了國家在上下文中是如何使用的。

meaning.en: A politically organized body of people under a single government.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個由單一政府統治的政治組織的人群。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘of a nation’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「與一個國家或國家有關或屬於一個國家或國家」？

example.text: A national holiday is celebrated by all citizens.

translation.zh-Hant: 所有公民都會慶祝國定假日。

meaning.en: Of or relating to or belonging to a nation or country.
meaning.zh-Hant: 與一個國家或國家有關或屬於一個國家或國家。

example.text: He is a national hero for his bravery.

translation.zh-Hant: 他因他的勇敢而成為國民英雄。

meaning.en: A person who owes allegiance to that nation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個對該國效忠的人。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「持有符合法律工作的研究生法律學位（如法學博士）的專業人士」？

example.text: He is a talented lawyer who works at a prestigious law firm.

translation.zh-Hant: 他是一位才華橫溢的律師，在一家著名的律師事務所工作。

meaning.en: A professional person with a graduate law degree that qualifies for legal work (such as Juris Doctor).
meaning.zh-Hant: 持有符合法律工作的研究生法律學位（如法學博士）的專業人士。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在許多宗教傳統中，這是一週的第二天，在使用ISO 8601規範的系統中，這是一週的第一天。它緊隨週日之後，緊鄰週二之前」？

example.text: Today is Monday, so it's a new week.

translation.zh-Hant: 今天是星期一，所以是新的一週。

meaning.en: The second day of the week in many religious traditions, and the first day of the week in systems using the ISO 8601 norm. It follows Sunday and precedes Tuesday.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在許多宗教傳統中，這是一週的第二天，在使用ISO 8601規範的系統中，這是一週的第一天。它緊隨週日之後，緊鄰週二之前。

plainExpression: A large landlocked stretch of water or similar

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘A large landlocked stretch of water or similar’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個大型的內陸水域或類似的液體」？

example.text: We visited a beautiful lake on our vacation.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在度假期間參觀了一個美麗的湖泊。

meaning.en: A large, landlocked stretch of water or similar liquid.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個大型的內陸水域或類似的液體。

plainExpression: A room or area for preparing food

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘A room or area for preparing food’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一個準備食物的房間或區域」？

example.text: She cooks in the kitchen every day.

translation.zh-Hant: 她每天都在廚房裡做飯。

meaning.en: A room or area for preparing food.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一個準備食物的房間或區域。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一些發明的東西」？

example.text: The invention of the internet revolutionized communication.

translation.zh-Hant: 網際網路的發明徹底改變了通訊。

meaning.en: Something invented.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一些發明的東西。

prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「很有可能成為這種情況或發生這種情況」？

example.text: It is likely that it will rain tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 明天可能會下雨。

meaning.en: Has a good chance of being the case or of coming about.
meaning.zh-Hant: 很有可能成為這種情況或發生這種情況。

example.text: This scandal will likely ruin your chances of being elected.

translation.zh-Hant: 這場醜聞可能會毀掉你當選的機會。

meaning.en: With considerable certainty; without much doubt.
meaning.zh-Hant: 非常肯定；毫無疑問。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘people with common origins’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「擁有共同起源或傳統的人，通常構成一個國家」？

example.text: Immigrants of the same nationality often seek each other out.

translation.zh-Hant: 同國籍的移民經常互相尋找。

meaning.en: People having common origins or traditions and often comprising a nation.
